title: geranium napuligerum f. lobulatum
intro: Geranium napuligerum f. lobulatum, also known as the geranium, is a perennial plant species within the Geraniaceae family. It is a fragrant herb used for its medicinal and aromatic properties. The plant is known to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its potential in promoting wound healing, reducing anxiety and stress, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Geranium napuligerum f. lobulatum include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which are often used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicine.
